titles.title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the telehealth network and telehealth resource centers grant programs.
To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the telehealth network and telehealth resource centers grant programs.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
Subcommittee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee by Voice Vote.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported by the Yeas and Nays: 48 - 0.
Reported by the Committee on Energy and Commerce. H. Rept. 119-322.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 275.

committee.name: House Energy and Commerce
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To

bill.summary: This bill reauthorizes through FY2030 grant programs to support telehealth networks and telehealth resource centers, which are administered by the Office for the Advancement of Telehealth within the Health Resources and Services Administration. These programs provide grants to health care providers and related entities to establish telehealth networks that expand access to and improve the quality of health care services and information in rural and medically underserved areas and for medically underserved populations.
